subcodes.title: Words spoken at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-07-04
subcodes.first_line: The words of the astrologers are for the most part doubtful and unreliable. But the whole of creation is interrelated like the different parts of the human body which have a complete affinity from the toenail to the hair on the head.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قول منجمین اکثر اشتباه و غیر معتبر است ولی جمیع کائنات بهم مرتبط مثل اعضآء هیکل انسان که ارتباط تام دارد
subcodes.subjects: @astrology and numerology, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar]
